mapper.select: SELECT o_id as id, o_date as date, o_total_price as total_price, o_state as state, user_id FROM orders

SELECT user.user_name as name, user.user_address as address, user.user_phone as phone, product.p_name as product, product.p_price as price, product.p_id as code, product_img.pi_image as image, order_detail.od_count as count
FROM order_detail
LEFT JOIN orders ON (order_detail.o_id = orders.o_id) LEFT JOIN user ON (orders.user_id = user.user_id) LEFT JOIN product ON(order_detail.p_id = product.p_id) LEFT JOIN product_img ON(product.p_id = product_img.p_id)
WHERE order_detail.o_id = #{id}
